item.title: タイの地から届けられた物語。 - Vietnam.vn
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: Vietnam, overseas residents, traditional, Ao Dai, entrepreneur

Summary: In a solemn atmosphere, several hundred Vietnamese overseas residents gathered, proudly wearing traditional Ao Dai outfits. This event celebrated and honored the achievements of successful Vietnamese expatriate entrepreneurs, who have made significant contributions to their local communities. The gathering served as a platform for these individuals to share their experiences and insights, fostering a sense of unity and pride among Vietnamese people living abroad. It highlighted the importance of cultural heritage, as the Ao Dai symbolizes not just traditional attire but also the rich history and identity of Vietnam. The presence of inspiring figures in the business world encouraged younger generations to pursue their ambitions while remaining connected to their roots. Such events are crucial in strengthening the bonds within the Vietnamese diaspora, reinforcing their commitment to supporting one another and contributing positively to society. Ultimately, this celebration showcased the resilience and success of the Vietnamese community overseas, reflecting their dedication to both their personal achievements and cultural legacy.
厳粛な雰囲気の中、数百人のベトナム人海外居住者が伝統的なアオザイを身に ... この施設は、成功したベトナム人海外在住実業家であり、常に地域社会 ...

item.title: 年金拠出率を2026年7月からは10％に引き上げ、一部居住者に適用(サウジアラビア) | ビジネス短信
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: pension contribution rate, 2026, increase, residents, JETRO

Summary: Starting from July 2026, the pension contribution rate will be increased to 10%. This change will impact certain residents who fall under the applicable guidelines. The adjustment aims to enhance the sustainability of the pension system, reflecting the ongoing demographic shifts and economic challenges. The decision aligns with broader efforts to ensure that the pension system remains viable for future generations, balancing the needs of the current workforce with those of retirees. JETRO has disseminated this information as part of their ongoing efforts to keep businesses informed about significant policy changes. The specifics regarding which residents will be affected by this increase have not been detailed yet, but stakeholders are urged to stay updated as more information becomes available. This development is part of a larger trend toward reforming social security systems in the face of an aging population and economic pressures. Businesses and individuals alike should begin preparing for the potential impacts of this policy change, including adjustments to financial planning and retirement strategies.
ビジネス短信 ―ジェトロの海外ニュース; 年金拠出率を2026年7月からは10％に引き上げ、一部居住者に適用. ビジネス短信. ビジネス短信のコンテンツ一覧 開く.

item.title: 海外不動産への投資と税金 | 浅田会計事務所（アサダカイケイジムショ）
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: resident, overseas real estate, rental, sale, tax implications

Summary: When a resident of Japan rents out or sells overseas real estate, several tax implications arise under both local and international jurisdictions. The income generated from such activities is subject to taxation in Japan, where residents are taxed on their global income. It’s crucial for residents to declare income from overseas properties in their annual tax returns. If the property is sold, capital gains tax will be applicable on the profit made from the sale. The tax rate can vary depending on the holding period of the asset. Moreover, depending on the country where the property is located, additional local taxes may apply. Residents can sometimes benefit from tax treaties between Japan and the foreign country to avoid double taxation. Keeping detailed records of all transactions, including purchase prices, selling prices, and expenses incurred, is essential for accurate tax reporting. Engaging with a tax professional can provide valuable guidance on navigating the complexities of international real estate transactions and ensuring compliance with all relevant tax laws.
昨日は非居住者が日本の不動産を賃貸・売却した場合でしたが、今日はその逆で居住者が海外の不動産を賃貸・売却した場合を確認します。

item.title: 注意喚起） マサチューセッツ州における竜巻注意報の発令について
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: Meteorological information, safety, tornado, localized, impact

Summary: Residents in Japan are urged to pay close attention to the latest meteorological information and to ensure their safety as severe weather conditions are anticipated. A localized tornado with potential maximum wind speeds of 80 km/h may occur, posing significant risks to individuals and property. It is crucial for everyone to stay informed about the weather updates, follow safety protocols, and take necessary precautions to protect themselves from possible dangers caused by extreme weather events. The emphasis is on readiness and alertness, as well as having emergency plans in place. Residents are recommended to seek shelter in sturdy buildings and remain away from windows during such occurrences. Community alerts and information from local meteorological agencies should be monitored continuously to receive updates on the situation as it develops. Preparedness, alongside adherence to safety measures, is vital to mitigate the risks associated with such unpredictable weather phenomena, ensuring the safety and well-being of all individuals affected.
在留邦人の皆様におかれましては、最新の気象情報に注意し、安全確保に努めてください。 ２ 予想される気象影響局地的な竜巻（Tornado）の発生最大時速80 ...

item.title: （続報）米国宛て郵便物の引受再開に関するお知らせ | 日本郵便株式会社
item.content:encoded:
Keywords: e転居, 不在時, 置き配, はこぽす, 郵便局アプリ

Summary: The e転居 service provides convenient options for receiving packages when you are not at home. One of the main features is the "置き配" (oku-hai) delivery service, which allows packages to be left at designated places, ensuring that customers can still receive their items securely. Additionally, users can utilize the "はこぽす" lockers available at various stations to pick up their parcels at their convenience. The service is integrated with the 郵便局アプリ (Post Office app), which makes it easier to track and manage deliveries. Furthermore, users can log in with ゆうID to streamline their experience. e転居 also offers a range of products for sending gifts or goods, making it a comprehensive solution for both receiving and sending packages. By addressing the common issue of missed deliveries, e転居 enhances customer satisfaction and streamlines the logistics of package management for individuals who may have busy schedules. This combination of features makes e転居 a valuable tool for anyone who frequently ships or receives goods.
e転居. 不在時の受け取りを便利に. 置き配 · はこぽす駅などのロッカーから荷物 ... e転居 · 郵便局アプリ · ゆうID. 送るための商品を買う ギフト・グッズなど ...

item.title: 郵便局網の維持に「国費」投入へ 金融2社株は当面保有、改正法 - 信濃毎日新聞
